provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male security chief in his 40s with a heavyweight build and a shaved head with a scar running across the crown, wearing a heavy charcoal ballistic vest with ceramic plate inserts over a steel-blue uniform, armored gauntlets, mag-lock assault boots with shin guards, a riot baton on one hip and an energy sidearm on the other, comm unit on the vest chest, the vest has impact marks from projectile rounds that were stopped by the plates

judgment.explanation: Alt seed security chief. More covered up this time with uniform shirt under vest. Better faction read than v1.
